itemReviewed.name: Babaji Vidhyashram Senior Secondary School - Perumbakkam

itemListElement.reviewBody: My son went to Babaji Vidhyasharam school for the last 4 years. Babaji is the best CBSC school , The teachers are very caring and supported my son for his well being.We are relocating. I want to express my sincere gratitude for all the kindness and support my son received.  I'm truly thankful to the Management ,Principal mam, empathy kids buddies, caring teachers, and Friendly Parents, the support staff, security staff for the well being of my son, accepting him as he is . We really miss good school. I am sure in future my son Pranav will become a proud old student of Babaji Vidhyasharam 👍

itemReviewed.name: Babaji Vidhyashram Senior Secondary School - Perumbakkam

itemListElement.reviewBody: Our experience with our son's school has been exceptional. The balanced CBSE curriculum is truly impressive. He absolutely loved the hands-on activities like design technology, pottery, and archery. We're also thrilled with the school's commitment to developing a service mindset through the ALCOR activities. The integration of sustainable development goals into interdisciplinary projects is another fantastic feature. It's clear that this school is dedicated to creating well-rounded, responsible individuals. We are so unfortunate to leave the school due to relocation.

itemReviewed.name: Babaji Vidhyashram Senior Secondary School - Perumbakkam

itemListElement.reviewBody: Admission process was done in a professional manner. They had every stage of admission clearly documented and adhered with no surprises. School tour helped us reassure our decision of choosing this school. Our son was excited to see around the facilities.

itemReviewed.name: Babaji Vidhyashram Senior Secondary School - Perumbakkam

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Just want to share a feedback about this school. we from bangalore tried for admission in this school. we didnt get interviewed yet. The school has given slots for everyone on the same day, including the people from other states. And we requested for specific dates which is convenient for us to visit from bangalore to chennai, but the response what we got is - "Sir, all parents should come on the same date. if you are not able to come.. then the seats will not be available and we cant assure any seats". what this implies is - they offer the seats on the same day or dates. and Ask the fees to be paid then and there to block the seats. There is no need for an in person interaction for this - school can say, please pay an amount first to block the seat and then come any time. That would be more convenient to many - who feel that this school might be bit different from others.
Just wanted to let other parents informed about this concern, which i felt is not the correct way. schools should consider, provide convenient slot and then take a decision to admit.

************
Update on this - Feb 22nd 2025.

Even after the above review I posted, we had guts to visit the school on the same slot they gave along with my family. And as I expected the experience was not good.

Our kids had exam - and we entered the principal office for an interaction. The first question I was asked - “oh, he is the guy who posted such review in google.” And from there are on the discussion went upside down. I at least didn’t expect this question in front of my kids. We had a Mindset to get the admission at first, but seeing this kind of respect in a principal office is not good sir. And if anyone can justify how we were treated and asked to leave.

We were asked to wait outside, and will be allowed only after the old telelphone recording was verified by them. We waited and waited and left to our disguise.

The admin team asked us a question- “what do you expect us to do”?

A request to the school would be- consider the below.
1. If it’s a genuine request, please consider.
2. if a family is coming from outside Chennai, they won’t have address proof. Only if they get admission in the school, they can produce all sort of address proof. Not the other way, to get admission first they can’t have proof much ahead.
3. For giving the application form even, it’s not convenient that someone should mandate visit to school. An online application form should be enough.
4. Not a good practice to collect phone of parents sir. Please don’t do this. We are not here to photoshoot. We like school, take admission happily. We don’t like, parents will simply leave.

Reviews and feedback- should be taken constructively. And not give bad name to a school. You want good feedback.. need to earn it. let me upgrade it. The school is best in Chennai. At least someone is happy.

itemReviewed.name: Babaji Vidhyashram Senior Secondary School - Perumbakkam

itemListElement.reviewBody: The school is very good in each and every aspect, the online application process was straightforward, the staff was warm, friendly and extremely helpful, the admission tour provided valuable insights of the school, curriculum, teaching methods. The admission process was well organized. Our overall experience with the admission process at Babaji Vidhyashram was extremely positive. We felt supported and guided throughout and we are greatful for the opportunity to be part of this wonderful school community.

itemReviewed.name: Babaji Vidhyashram Senior Secondary School - Perumbakkam

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I have recently came to know about this school from my community. Then I visited this school for the my daughters admission. The school offers a wide range of activities and holistic education. I really fell in love with the whole school. The staffs and the whole admission process is smooth and transparent.
I hope my daughter will enjoy here.

itemReviewed.name: Babaji Vidhyashram Senior Secondary School - Perumbakkam

itemListElement.reviewBody: School tour was beautiful! Loved the amenities and the way students were in charge of the tour. Peaceful admissions process for younger grades. There was an interaction session where toys were kept around and teachers didn't impose questions on the kid. She was free to play and they observed. Rest of the documentation process was very well organized. Overall smooth process! Excited to admit my kid to this school..
